My parents took us boys to Hershey Park, where I ended up developing my fear of heights (Man, this trip was weirdly impactful on my life...), and then we went to the concert after. It was shortly before the release of their album Celebrity. I only remember two things about that concert: Pop was pretty catchy and fun to watch performed live and near my dad, brother, and myself (because my mom and sister got better seats to accommodate my sisters handicap) there was a buxom woman who was not shy about putting her um... natural gifts... on display in a crowd that included a then 9 year old me. I remember the feeling being more of shock at her lack of modesty than any kind of arousal. Anyway, this is a catchy one but Backstreet 4-ever.
